     ['Model']

     ['a']

    group.usd            /Group{v=y}Model

     ['a']

Results for composing </Root>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /Root
    model.usd            /Model
    model.usd            /Model{v=x}

    {v = x}

     ['Child']

Property names:
     ['modelAttr']

    model.usd            /Model{v=x}.modelAttr
